hooks.command:
echo '
 Current branch:' && git branch --show-current && echo '
 Git status:' && git status -s | head -10 && echo '
 Recent commits:' && git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null || echo 'Not a git repo'
echo '\n[Auto-check] Running typecheck...' && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5
echo '[BLOCKED] Dangerous rm -rf command blocked for safety' && exit 1
echo '[BLOCKED] Force push blocked - use --force-with-lease instead' && exit 1
echo '[BLOCKED] Force push blocked - use --force-with-lease instead' && exit 1
echo '[BLOCKED] Hard reset blocked - this would lose uncommitted changes. Use git stash first.' && exit 1
echo '[BLOCKED] git clean -fd blocked - this permanently deletes untracked files' && exit 1
echo '[BLOCKED] This discards all local changes. Stash them first with: git stash push -m "backup"' && exit 1
echo '[HINT] Consider using the /make-pr skill for consistent PR quality (title, description, test plan).'

if [ -n "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" ] && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -q 'command not found'; then echo '[TOOL-MISS] A command was not found. Check if it needs to be installed (e.g., brew install <tool>) or if there is a platform-specific alternative (BSD vs GNU).'; fi

if [ -n "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" ] && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -q 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND\|Cannot find module\|Module not found'; then echo '[TOOL-MISS] A module was not found. Run bun install to ensure dependencies are up to date.'; fi
